title: knautia ciliata
intro: Knautia ciliata, also known as the red pimpernel or rose knautia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae, native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knautia ciliata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Knautia ciliata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
